label: Transparent Mountain Goat motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Mountain Goat transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated mountain goat motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A full-body alpine mountain goat with dense white winter fur, subtle cream and cool gray shadowing, black curved horns, black hooves, compact powerful climbing stance, accurate anatomy, crisp silhouette edges, and natural shaggy fur texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the entire animal, horns, beard, legs, and hooves without cropping; stable side-three-quarter stance suggesting cliff confidence.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves white fur detail, black horn contrast, granite-gray undertones, and fine fur texture.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 removable chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no sheep, no ram, no ibex, no deer, no antelope, no landscape, no rocks, no snow field, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no text, no watermark, no props, no second animal.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Create one high-resolution wide 16:9 comprehensive LIGHT-MODE design-system board for "Morphous Mountain Goat" / "Mountain Goat". Use the provided motif as the source reference: white shaggy mountain goat fur, black curved horns, black hooves, granite cliff gray, alpine air, and a stable climbing system mood.

Board requirements: 3840x2160 target composition, crisp readable labels, polished product-design presentation, not a marketing poster. Include all sections in one board: palette, typography, English/Japanese type guidance, UI components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture swatches, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, icon treatment, and sample usage.

Light theme visual language: snowfield paper background, warm white fur surfaces, granite-gray structure, horn-black text, ice-blue focus rings, lichen-sage support accents, alpine amber warnings. Use cliff ledge geometry, sure-footed stepped layouts, compact stable controls, fine fur-grain texture, granite striation dividers, and small black-horn emphasis strokes.

Palette labels to show: Snow Fur #f7f4ec, Horn Black #181715, Granite Gray #696d6c, Cliff Shadow #3f4442, Alpine Mist #dfe8e6, Lichen Sage #8c9b72, Ice Blue #9fc9d1, Hoof Charcoal #252827, Sunlit Scree #c4ad83.

Typography guidance: English: steady grotesk UI with firm numeric rhythm; Japanese: Noto Sans JP / system sans, generous line-height and clear kana-kanji contrast. Include a compact specimen with headings, body, captions, numerals, and bilingual labels.

Constraints: no purple/blue generic gradients, no one-note beige palette, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brand names, no illegible microtext, no sheep/ram/ibex confusion, no landscapes dominating the board. The mountain goat motif should be visible as a reference cutout and translated into UI tokens.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Create one high-resolution wide 16:9 comprehensive DARK-MODE design-system board for "Morphous Mountain Goat" / "Mountain Goat". Translate the same light-mode motif/system into dark mode: white shaggy mountain goat fur, black curved horns, black hooves, granite cliff gray, alpine air, stable climbing system mood.

Board requirements: 3840x2160 target composition, crisp readable labels, polished product-design presentation, not a marketing poster. Include all sections in one board: dark palette, typography, English/Japanese type guidance, UI components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture swatches, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, icon treatment, and sample usage.

Dark theme visual language: horn-black and cliff-shadow background, charcoal cards, snow-fur foreground, granite borders, ice-blue focus rings, lichen-sage success/support, sunlit-scree amber warnings. Use cliff ledge geometry, sure-footed stepped layouts, compact stable controls, fine fur-grain texture, granite striation dividers, and white-fur highlights against black-horn structure.

Palette labels to show: Horn Night #121312, Hoof Charcoal #252827, Cliff Shadow #3f4442, Granite Gray #696d6c, Snow Fur #f7f4ec, Alpine Mist #dfe8e6, Lichen Sage #8c9b72, Ice Blue #9fc9d1, Sunlit Scree #c4ad83.

Typography guidance: English: steady grotesk UI with firm numeric rhythm; Japanese: Noto Sans JP / system sans, generous line-height and clear kana-kanji contrast. Include a compact specimen with headings, body, captions, numerals, and bilingual labels.

Constraints: no purple/blue generic gradients, no neon cyber palette, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brand names, no illegible microtext, no sheep/ram/ibex confusion, no landscapes dominating the board. The mountain goat motif should be visible as a reference cutout and translated into dark UI tokens.
